snippet.title: HP CEO reveals how the AI boom may change your computer
snippet.description:
#hp #ai #yahoofinance 

HP Inc.'s (HPQ) recent third-quarter earnings results showed how the slowing demand for PCs is impacting the company. HP CEO Enrique Lores sits down with Yahoo Finance Executive Editor Brian Sozzi at the Goldman Sachs Communacopia & Technology Conference to discuss the company’s performance, outlook and how the AI boom will change computers. "We see improvement both in the performance of the company and to a certain extent on demand, but clearly, at a lower pace than what we were expecting a few quarters ago," Lores explained, adding: "We thought it was prudent to adjust our guide for Q4 to reflect the reality that... we see."Click here for more of Yahoo Finance's coverage from the Goldman Sachs Communacopia tech conference.

Subscribe to Yahoo Finance: https://yhoo.it/2fGu5Bb

snippet.description:

HP CEO Enrique Lores joined us to offer his personal insights into our season two guests and share his own takeaways on the excitement building for the future of AI.

#HPTheMoment

snippet.title: ⭐ A New Reality: Building the Metaverse #WEF23 #Davos
snippet.description:
⭐ DESCRIPTION: While the metaverse is still in its infancy, investment in its development has accelerated with top global players investing an estimated $180 billion in the past few years. The technology's development is dependent on research, innovation, investment and policy. How can a safe, accessible and economically viable metaverse be operationalized?

This session was developed in collaboration with The Atlantic. This session is directly linked to the ongoing Defining and Building the Metaverse Initiative of the World Economic Forum.

⭐ SPEAKERS:
📌 Nicholas Thompson
Chief Executive Officer, The Atlantic
📌 Chris Cox
Chief Product Officer, Meta Platforms Inc.
📌 Enrique Lores
President and Chief Executive Officer, HP Inc.
📌 Paula Ingabire
Minister of Information Communication Technology and Innovation, Ministry of Information Communication Technology and Innovation of Rwanda
📌 Neal Stephenson
Author
📌 Cathy Li
Head, Shaping the Future of Media, Entertainment & Sport; Member of the ExCom, World Economic Forum Geneva

⭐ CATEGORY:
📌 World Economic Forum
✅ Creative Commons

snippet.title: A short interview with CEO Thomas Hill and Ilya Churakov
snippet.description:
📣 We are thrilled to present you with a fantastic video, a short interview featuring our partners DAC DUBAI, who have been instrumental in our recent business mission in Saudi Arabia. They have been a tremendous help, and we couldn't have done it without them! 🤝
In the coming months, get ready to receive some incredibly important information from us. We have been working tirelessly behind the scenes to bring you groundbreaking updates. 🚀
But hold on tight because we have an exclusive announcement for you! We are proud to say that we will soon become the first project on the market with such a tangible and real asset. 💎
That's not all! We are actively forging partnerships with major funds, and we can't wait to share our progress with you very soon. Stay tuned for more exciting developments! 📈
To our dedicated and passionate community who have been by our side from the beginning, we want you to know that your trust and belief in us means the world. With each passing day, the chances of recognizing that investing in Basaltcoin is one of the best decisions you can make become even greater. 💪🏽🔥📈
Thank you for your unwavering support. Together, we are building a brighter future!💴

#defi #greentechnology #crypto #cryptocurrency #refinance

snippet.title: Tristia Harrison, TalkTalk CEO, on full fibre, the AltNets, Equinox 2, & Business Direct sale
snippet.description:
I really enjoyed catching up with Tristia Harrison, TalkTalk’s CEO, at Zen’s Rochdale HQ.  We discussed TalkTalk’s full fibre strategy, the AltNets (including TalkTalk’s partnerships with CityFibre, Community Fibre, ITS, and Freedom Fibre), consolidation in the AltNet market, TalkTalk’s purchase of Virtual1, Ofcom’s review of Openreach’s proposed Equinox 2 discount scheme, why TalkTalk wants to sell off its TalkTalk Business Direct division, and TalkTalk’s justification for hiking its prices beyond the rate of inflation.  We also covered Tristia’s thoughts on women in tech, and how Crisis, the national homeless charity that she chairs, is aiming to end homelessness for good.

Chapters
00:00 TalkTalk's full fibre strategy with the AltNets
06:19 TalkTalk's view on Openreach Equinox 2
07:42 Why sell off TalkTalk Business Direct?
09:07 How does TalkTalk justify hiking its prices beyond inflation?
10:22 Thoughts about women in tech
12:24 As Chair of Crisis, is "ending homelessness for good" achievable?

snippet.title: A Conversation with ConEdison CEO Tim Cawley
snippet.description:
A wide-ranging one-on-one conversation with Timothy P. Cawley, Chairman, President, and CEO of ConEdison examining New York's energy challenges and how ConEd is evolving to meet the needs of the modern age. Moderated by Susan Leeds, Principal in Climate Finance at Garrison Associates.

Recorded April 26, 2023 at The Yale Club of New York City.
